description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named Simple CI that triggers on pull requests, push events, and workflow dispatches. The workflow should have multiple jobs for building and testing on different environments (Ubuntu, macOS, Windows), including jobs for installing dependencies, configuring, building, checking, and testing. Additionally, include jobs for code analysis and compliance checks (clang-format, clang-tidy, cpplint, prettier-markdown, cmakelint, shellcheck, REUSE-compliance).
